scripts.build: pnpm --filter "./artifacts/trading-journal" --filter "./artifacts/api-server" --if-present run build && (if exist out rd /s /q out) && mkdir out\api-dist out\api && xcopy /e /i /y artifacts\trading-journal\dist\public\* out\ && xcopy /e /i /y artifacts\api-server\dist\* out\api-dist\ && xcopy /e /i /y api\* out\api\
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
